full_description: HabitTracker is a simple app that helps users track and maintain their daily habits. It provides a straightforward way to monitor progress and stay motivated. With HabitTracker, you can easily create and manage your habits, set reminders, and view your progress over time. The app is designed to be user-friendly and intuitive, making it easy to get started and stay on track. Whether you're looking to build positive habits or break negative ones, HabitTracker is the perfect tool to help you achieve your goals.
